name: Shadow Trick
author: Poki
description: Are you looking to conquer a magical realm full of minions, traps, and boss fights? Look no further than Shadow Trick - a fast-paced platforming game with beautuful 16-bit aesthetics and charming music tracks! The game features clever gameplay where you take the role of a wizard capable of becoming a shadow, looking to clear any challenge set before him. There are many collectible Moons for you to discover in order to fully master each level. Come and master the power of the shadows! How do I play Shadow Trick? Move Left: A or the left arrow key Move Right: D or the right arrow key Jump: W or the up arrow key Shadow Mode: E, Spacebar, or the Enter key Pause: P or the Escape key Who created Shadow Trick? Shadow Trick is created by Neutronized. Play their other game on Poki: Slime Laboratory , Slime Laboratory 2 , Snow Tale , Picnic Penguin , Magic Bridge , Lost Yeti , Yokai Dungeon , Mimelet , Drop Wizard Tower , Dyna Boy , Double Panda and Slime Pizza ! How can I play Shadow Trick for free? You can play Shadow Trick for free on Poki. Can I play Shadow Trick on mobile devices and desktop? Shadow Trick can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
